zh.Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國諾廷加姆爾謝爾福德
zh.lifeSummary: Rose de Hanselyn是Ralph de Hanselyn的女兒，於1145年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾謝爾福德。她於1166年之前與Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1193年在她的家鄉享年49歲。

zh-hans.Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England: 英国諾廷加姆爾謝爾福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rose de Hanselyn是Ralph de Hanselyn的女儿，于1145年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾謝爾福德。她于1166年之前与Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1193年在她的家乡享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

en.lifeSummary: Rose de Hanselyn was born in 1145, in Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England as the daughter of Ralph de Hanselyn. She married Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell before 1166. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died about 1193, in her hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Rose de Hanselyn est née en 1145, à Shelford, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, fille de Ralph de Hanselyn. Elle a épousé Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell avant 1166. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1193, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Rose de Hanselyn wurde 1145 in Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, als Tochter von Ralph de Hanselyn geboren. Sie hat vor 1166 Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1193 im Alter von 49 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Rose de Hanselyn è nata il nel 1145 nel Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England come figlia di Ralph de Hanselyn. Lei sposato Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell prima del 1166. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1193, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rose de Hanselynは1145年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアシェルフォードでRalph de Hanselynの娘として生まれた。1166年以前にThomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1193年に故郷で49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rose de Hanselyn(은)는 1145년 영국 노틴그함실르 셸퍼드에서 Ralph de Hanselyn의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1166년 이전 Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1193년 그녀의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Norwich, City of Norwich, Norfolk, Engla: Norwich, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Rose de Hanselyn nasceu em 1145, em Shelford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra filha de Ralph de Hanselyn. Ela casou-se com Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell antes 1166. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1193, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Rose de Hanselyn родилась в 1145 г. в местности шелфорд, ноттингхамшир, Англия. Её отца звали Ralph de Hanselyn. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell перед 1166 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла около 1193 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Rose de Hanselyn nació en 1145, en Shelford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra como hija de Ralph de Hanselyn. Se casó con Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell antes de 1166. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1193, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años.
